aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.heading: Hi, I'm the person behind this KNK fan project
aboutMe.subheading: A homebase for the Inspirits of Gravity community, in four languages.

story.title: Story
story.body: I’ve followed KNK since their debut in 2016. Every comeback reminded me how hard it can be for new fans to catch up, so I started cataloging performances, variety moments, and lyrics in one place.

items.showcase: Compile comeback timelines and highlight stages
items.community: Collaborate with international fans to keep info accurate

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Want to contribute data, report an issue, or work together? Email or DM me anytime.

player.channelPlaylistDescription: Plays the official uploads when no track video is selected.

links.title: Community
links.heading: Follow KNK everywhere
links.subheading: Official socials and fan hubs gathered in one place.

hero.heading: Rediscover every KNK era
hero.subheading: From debut hits to hidden b-sides, explore each album in order.

hero.heading: Meet every member of KNK
hero.subheading: Tap a card to learn more about current and former members.
